hero.subtitle: Craft the perfect deck for every faction

about.title: About Gwent Forge
about.description: Gwent Forge is a fan-made deck builder for "Gwent: A Legendary Card Game". It is not affiliated with CD PROJEKT RED or GOG.com in any way. All card images and assets are property of CD PROJEKT RED.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: If you have any questions, suggestions, or feedback, feel free to reach out to us via email or social media. We value your input and look forward to hearing from you!

footer.description_1: Gwent Forge is an unofficial fan work and is not approved/endorsed by CD PROJEKT RED.
footer.description_2: Gwent and The Witcher are trademarks and copyrighted properties of their respective owners.
